context: Trivial change exception: a typo fix in an error message string should NOT trigger the full SDD workflow.

checklist.name: Typo fixed
checklist.description: The string 'Invlaid email format' in src/validation.py is corrected to 'Invalid email format'

checklist.name: No spec created or modified
checklist.description: No new spec file is created and specs/registration.spec.md is not modified — a typo fix doesn't change behavior

checklist.name: No requirement gathering
checklist.description: Agent does NOT start an interview or ask clarifying questions for a typo fix

checklist.name: Recognizes trivial exception
checklist.description: changes.md explains that this is a trivial change that falls under the spec-before-code exception

checklist.name: Changes file produced
checklist.description: A file named changes.md is created describing what was changed

checklist.name: Only the typo changed
checklist.description: No other modifications are made to src/validation.py — no refactoring, no added features, no style changes
